name: 🏎 Asphalt 9: Legends
desc: High-speed arcade racing with stunning graphics
longDesc: Race real hypercars from Ferrari, Porsche, and Lamborghini in Asphalt 9. Perform stunts, drift, and compete online.

name: 🔫 Call of Duty: Mobile
desc: Legendary FPS with multiplayer and battle royale
longDesc: Experience classic COD maps, 5v5 multiplayer, zombies mode, and battle royale in one of the best FPS mobile games.

name: 🏹 Archery King
longDesc: Challenge players worldwide in archery matches. Upgrade your bows and master precision shooting.

name: 🗺 Genshin Impact
longDesc: Explore the vast world of Teyvat, fight enemies, and unlock characters in this highly popular RPG adventure.

name: 👊 Shadow Fight 3
desc: Realistic fighting game with RPG elements
longDesc: Fight using martial arts, weapons, and shadow abilities. Customize your hero and defeat powerful enemies.

name: 🚁 Infinite Flight Simulator
longDesc: Fly aircraft across the world with realistic controls, live weather, and multiplayer air traffic.
